title: L61 - work_factory_capabilities
description: Capability catalog backed by patterns (L58). Each capability represents a cohesive automation capability (e.g., 'schema migration automation', 'API deployment', 'test generation') that can be packaged into services (L62). Capabilities are abstract/compositional, services are concrete implementations.

description.description: Detailed description of what this capability does, when to use it, and its value proposition

backed_by_pattern_ids.description: FK array to L58 work_reusable_patterns. Patterns that implement this capability (SET_NULL on pattern delete).

required_patterns.description: Subset of backed_by_pattern_ids that are required for this capability to function (minimum viable capability).

optional_patterns.description: Subset of backed_by_pattern_ids that are optional enhancements (improved capability but not essential).

prerequisites.description: What must be in place before this capability can be used (tech stack requirements, access permissions, etc.)

input_schema_ref.description: FK to L21 schemas (optional). JSON schema defining valid inputs for this capability.

output_schema_ref.description: FK to L21 schemas (optional). JSON schema defining expected outputs.

tags.description: Searchable categorization tags (deployment, testing, refactoring, analysis, etc.)

owner_id.description: Polymorphic FK to owner (agent/cp_agent/persona who maintains this capability)

deprecation_reason.description: Why this capability was deprecated (if maturity_level=deprecated)

replacement_capability_id.description: FK to L61 (self-reference). If deprecated, which capability replaced this one.
